name: Banana Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease two 8-inch round pans well and dust with flour.
2. Beat egg whites until frothy.
3. Gradually beat in 1/3 cup sugar. Continue beating until very stiff and glossy.
4. In another bowl, sift remaining sugar, flour, baking powder, soda, and salt.
5. Add oil, mashed bananas, half of buttermilk, and vanilla extract. Beat for 1 minute at medium speed on a mixer.
6. Scrape sides and bottom of the bowl constantly.
7. Add remaining buttermilk and egg yolks. Beat for another minute.
8. Fold in beaten egg whites. Fold nuts gently.
9. Pour batter into prepared pans.
10. Bake in a 350°F oven for 30-35 minutes.
11. Cool. Frost with whipped cream. Decorate with sliced bananas.
